steps.title: Use sphere volume
steps.content:
The volume of a sphere is
$$V=\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3$$
Here, the radius is
$$r=19/5$$

steps.title: Calculate the volume
steps.content:
Substitute into the volume formula.
$$V=\frac{4}{3}\pi\cdot\frac{6{,}859}{125}=\frac{27{,}436\pi}{375}$$
The answer is D.
